title: En Nenjil Lyrics Naaigal Jaakirathai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: En Nenjil
Singer(s): Naresh Iyer
Movie: Naaigal Jaakirathai
Music: Dharan Kumar

En nenjil yaerinaai
en vazhvai nee maattrinaai maattrinaai
Un kaadhal koorinaaye
en sondham nee aaginaai aaginaai

En thaai pol, en thozhan pol
ennai nee paaraattinaai
maarbile modhinaai
muththathil neeraattinaai
kadhalin sangili kondenai
nee kattinaai.

Naalum naalum ennai
andaththin maiyyam aakkinaai aakkinaai
deivam unmai endru
naan konda aiyyam neekkinaai neekkinaai

Vaaikondu pesaamal un
seigaiyaal nee pesinaai
maarbile modhinaai
muththathil neeraattinaai
kadhalin sangili kondenai
nee kattinaai.

Kobam naan kondaen
dhooram ponaai ponaai
sogam naan kondaen.
kanneernakki ponaai

Naanum aada
nee kondaadinaai en pinnae.
Naan oda
kaavalai odinaai en munnae .

En nenjil yaerinaai
en vazhvai nee maattrinaai maattrinaai
Un kaadhal koorinaaye
en sondham nee aaginaai aaginaai

En thaai pol, en thozhan pol
ennai nee paaraattinaai
maarbile modhinaai
muththathil neeraattinaai
kadhalin sangili kondenai
nee kattinaai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song En Nenjil?

The song En Nenjil expresses deep emotions of love and connection, highlighting how love transforms one's life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie Naaigal Jaakirathai?

In Naaigal Jaakirathai, the song plays during a romantic moment, emphasizing the bond between the lead characters.

Who is the singer of En Nenjil?

The song is sung by the talented Naresh Iyer, known for his melodious voice in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for En Nenjil?

The music for this beautiful song was composed by Dharan Kumar, who is known for his catchy and soulful tunes.

When was En Nenjil released?

The song was released on September 3, 2014, as part of the movie Naaigal Jaakirathai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song En Nenjil from Naaigal Jaakirathai encapsulates the essence of romantic love through its heartfelt lyrics and soothing melody. It portrays the transformative power of love, where the protagonist expresses how their life changes with their beloved's presence. The gentle rhythm and Naresh Iyer's emotive singing evoke feelings of warmth and intimacy. This song is perfect for moments of reflection and connection, making it a cherished piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Nenjil from the movie Naaigal Jaakirathai is a mesmerizing romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Naresh Iyer's soulful vocals and Dharan Kumar's enchanting composition, this song creates an intimate atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Dive into the heartfelt lyrics and let the soothing vibes of this track sweep you off your feet.
stanzaMeanings: You have entered my heart and changed my life. Your love has become my identity.
Like my mother, like my friend, you have embraced me. You have made me shine in the world and have filled my heart with love.
Every day, you have made me the center of that place. I have accepted that God is the truth, and you have taken away my worries.
Without speaking, you have acted, and you have spoken through your actions. You have made me shine in the world and have filled my heart with love.
I have become angry, and you have gone far away. I have felt sorrow, and my tears have fallen.
I too will dance, you have taken me along. I have run to protect you in front of me.
No one is like you; you have given me affection.
You have entered my heart and changed my life. Your love has become my identity.
Like my mother, like my friend, you have embraced me. You have made me shine in the world and have filled my heart with love.
